item.title: Kubernetes Static Pod
item.author: Author
item.description: Static PODs vs DaemonSets Static PODs DaemonSets Created by kubelet Created by kube-api server (DaemonSet Controller) Deploy Control Plane components as Static PODs Deploy Monitoring Agents, Logging Agents on Nodes Ignore kube-scheduler Ignore kube-scheduler Default Static PODs Location Static PODs When created or deleted a YAML file in the /etc/kubernetes/manifests, the PODs will be created or deleted automatically.
